title: Fed Unveils Plan on Eliminating Reputation Risk in Bank Exam
description: The Federal Reserve unveiled a new proposal that further targets how examiners scrutinize banks’ risk after President Donald Trump moved to rein in what he sees as the closing of customer accounts for unfair reasons.
content: The Federal Reserve unveiled a new proposal that further targets how examiners scrutinize banks’ risk after President Donald Trump moved to rein in what he sees as the closing of customer accounts for unfair reasons.
